name: Maria Delgado
summary: Compassionate caregiver with about three years of experience supporting elderly clients in private homes and an assisted-living facility. Bilingual in English and Spanish.

responsibilities: Provide one-on-one care for two elderly clients with limited mobility
Assist with bathing, grooming, dressing, and other daily living activities
Prepare meals following dietary restrictions and handle light housekeeping
Give medication reminders and record daily care notes for the family
Supported 8-10 residents per shift with personal care and mobility
Helped residents transfer safely between bed and wheelchair
Accompanied residents to on-site appointments and activities

education: High school diploma - Fairview High School, Fairview, OH (2021)
other_relevant: Comfortable working with clients who primarily speak Spanish
